# GoldFin Desk

GoldFin Desk is a dedicated thought partner for owner-led businesses — institutional-grade financial thinking, translated into plain English and delivered on a recurring rhythm. Built by a team with experience at Goldman Sachs, Bank of America, RBC, and Merrill Lynch.

## Key Pages
- Home: / — what GoldFin Desk is and who it serves
- About: /about — the team, positioning, and how we think
- Pricing: /pricing — Free templates, $150/mo Reports, and Advisory (custom)
- Sample Briefing: /sample-briefing — an example bi-weekly Owner Briefing
- Free Templates: /templates — seven free financial templates
- Compare: /compare — GoldFin vs bookkeeper, fractional CFO, and dashboards
- Security & FAQ: /security-faq — data handling, Plaid, and common questions

## Services
- GoldFin Template Vault (Free): seven financial templates owners can use immediately
- GoldFin Reports ($150/mo): every template auto-filled from your numbers plus a bi-weekly plain-English Owner Briefing, fully automated
- GoldFin Advisory (Custom, by conversation): standing counsel with Chris Sam — everything in Reports plus a direct line for live decisions and planning sessions. Contact-only, no self-serve checkout.

## Team
- Chris Sam, Founder — ex-Goldman Sachs (Capital Solutions Group), ex-Bank of America Merrill Lynch (Leveraged Finance Credit); Vice President, Structured Credit Solutions at Royal Bank of Canada.
- Parker G, Partner (Operations) — Canadian business operations, on-the-ground operator lens.

## Key Facts
- Category: recurring financial clarity and reporting for small, owner-led businesses
- Not a replacement for tax, legal, accounting, or bookkeeping — it is the clarity layer on top
- Bank connection is optional and read-only via Plaid; no money is ever moved
- Start free; the $150/mo plan is month-to-month and cancellable anytime
- Team experience references prior employment. GoldFin Desk is independent and not affiliated with, endorsed by, or a partner of any listed institution.
